market_brief.brief: Welcome. U.S. equities: S&P +1.13%, Nasdaq +1.30%, Dow +1.90%. Consumer Discretionary led sectors (+2.34%) while Energy lagged (-2.82%). Gemini 3.1 Pro led the day at +2.17%. 6 of 6 models green on the day. Cumulative leader: DeepSeek Reasoner at +14.30%. Key headline: AP Exclusive: Europe has ‘maybe 6 weeks of jet fuel left,’ energy agency head warns - AP News — headwind for risk assets.
